Restores the "ShipLog" name and keeps the logo.

## Fixed
- Plugin name is **ShipLog** again everywhere (Plugins list, Settings, Community
  Apps), and the missing description is back. The logo still shows in the Plugins
  tab — it's now set via the `<ICON>` element (a local path, the way FanCtrlPlus
  does it), which is name-independent. The v1.0.7 lowercase-name workaround is
  reverted.

## Install / update
Please **remove + reinstall once** to clear the v1.0.7 state, then it's fine:

```
removepkg shiplog
```
then Plugins → Install Plugin:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```
